final:
module LDO (
    input wire Vin,      // Input voltage
    input wire obf_Vctrl,    // Control signal
    output reg Vout      // Output voltage
);
    parameter Vdrop = 1; // Dropout voltage of 1V

    always @(*) begin
        if (obf_Vctrl) begin
            Vout = Vin - Vdrop; // Output is Vin - Vdrop when obf_Vctrl is high
        end else begin
            Vout = 0;            // Output is 0 when obf_Vctrl is low
        end
    end
endmodule
